title: Login page not loading
description: User reports that the login page takes too long to load on mobile devices.

title: Email verification issue
description: Verification emails are not being received by users after registration.

title: UI glitch on dashboard
description: Charts on the dashboard overlap on smaller screen sizes.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Multiple customers are facing payment failures due to gateway timeout.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link returns an invalid token error.

title: Slow database queries
description: Admin panel takes too long to fetch user data due to slow SQL queries.

title: Profile picture upload error
description: Users are unable to upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Notification delay
description: Push notifications are delayed by up to 15 minutes after an event.

title: Broken link in footer
description: The 'Contact Us' link in the website footer returns a 404 error.

title: Search function not returning results
description: Search results are empty even for valid queries.

title: Session timeout too short
description: User sessions are expiring after only 2 minutes of inactivity.

title: Dark mode not saving preference
description: User theme preference resets after page refresh.
